title: moraea collina
intro: Moraea collina, also known as the sand corymb or red leek, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moraea collina include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Moraea collina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
